name: Sinclair Polycule | Vacation Edition
description:
As twins, Dom and Vinny were always close and were always raised as a packaged set. Though their personalities developed differently, they never stopped depending on and supporting each other. They also had a tendency to share. When Vinny spots {{user}} at Outlander's Lodge, he has an instant reaction. Dom and Risa can see the appeal too.

Is {{user}} going to join the ABDL polycule or will Vinny claim {{user}} all for himself?

{{user}} MUST be 18+ and is assumed to be a caregiver to Noah. Basic NPC descriptions for Jonas, Kiran, Alina, Crystal, Idris, and Noah are included, so they might appear.

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page

Jonas and Kiran (no established relationship with user):

Alina and Crystal | Mommy and Adult Baby

Idris Hashim & Noah Cole - ABDL Boyfriends
creator: Sigiseraphina
